docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEECH, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, MICHAEL SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-29-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-24-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-11-1998

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-05-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON MAY-05-1998, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF(S) IN PRO PER., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-20-1998 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER HEARING SET FOR JUL-08-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
